title: Pixar-Style African Youth Portrait
promptText: A Pixar Style young girl of African descent, likely aged 3-5, is depicted. She is positioned slightly to the left of center within the image. The girl is facing the viewer and is holding a bunch of pastel-colored balloons (pink, light teal, and light teal/green). Her hair is styled in a bun, adorned with a small bow with embellishments. She is wearing a light mint-green tulle tutu-style dress with a sparkly bodice. She is wearing white socks and high-top sneakers with black accents and the Nike logo. Her expression is joyful and playful. Her body is slender, with a youthful build. The background is a soft, light-pink color. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the girl and her dress. The style is a Pixar style with intricate details in the balloons and dress. The image has a light, airy, and celebratory atmosphere.
